result.stdout:
CLI to quickly get a Giphy link or markdown for your search (which should always be lolcats).

Usage: GiphyCli [options] <Search>

Arguments:
  Search                    The search to execute.

Options:
  -m|--markdown             Output only markdown
  -nq|--no-questions-asked  Output markdown and link - don't ask any questions
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.
